metadata.title: Bizarre Lineage World Events
metadata.description: Bizarre Lineage events guide covering Meteor Shower, World Boss Dio, Stand Rush, Raid Portal Opening, Graveyard Uprising, rewards, and level tips.

quick_answer.title: Quick answer
quick_answer.summary: Bizarre Lineage events are server-wide activities that appear during play and usually reward EXP, loot, or rare progression items. Most players should treat level 50 as the safe baseline before joining the harder events.

cooldown_loop.title: How the event loop works
cooldown_loop.description: Events can appear during normal server play, and each one pushes a different kind of route: loot farming, bossing, PvP, raid access, or survival. If you are under level 50, it is usually smarter to prioritize leveling first and then rotate into the tougher event windows.

page.editorial_note: This page focuses on the event loop players actually need: where each event shows up, what it does, and which rewards make it worth joining.
